_publications._publicationTitle: Analysis of muscle tissue in vivo using fiber-optic autofluorescence and diffuse reflectance spectroscopy.

_contextSnippet: NF1 has shown features of a metabolic myopathy, and histological staining of quadriceps muscle in Nf1Prx1−/− revealed an accumulation of intramyocellular lipid.
details: NF1 mice showed accumulation of intramyocellular lipid in quadriceps muscle as revealed by Oil Red O staining
